title: minuartia mutabilis var. atlantica
intro: Minuartia mutabilis var. atlantica, also known as Alpine Rock Cinquefoil, is a plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, ulcers, and skin irritations, as well as its potential in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. Minuartia mutabilis var. atlantica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
